gaps: No existing test case covers Transparency Mode sub-setting persistence at all — all 15 provided test cases are about onboarding, EULA, dark mode, and Find My Device location permissions.

The bug involves a specific LIFECYCLE DIMENSION gap: values reverting after app close/reopen (steps 6-7 and 11-12). No test validates that Transparency Mode sub-setting selection (Environment vs. Speech) persists across app kill/relaunch.

The bug involves a specific STATE TRIGGER gap: the value is lost when switching between Environment and Speech sub-settings after an app restart cycle. No test validates that the last-selected sub-setting tab is preserved when the app is killed and reopened.

DEVICE ASYMMETRY gap: The bug explicitly mentions Free 60 and Free 20. No test validates Transparency Mode behavior specifically on these TWS earbud models vs. over-ear models like Voyager Surround 80.

Missing scenario: Set Transparency Mode to Environment → close app → reopen → verify Environment is still selected → switch to Speech → close app → reopen → verify Speech is still selected. This exact lifecycle sequence is untested.

Missing scenario: Verify that the sub-setting tab selection (Environment vs. Speech) persists across: (a) navigating to another settings screen and back, (b) app background/foreground, (c) app kill/relaunch, (d) Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting tab selection persists across app kill/relaunch (Environment → Speech cycle)
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Verify the default sub-setting tab is selected (Environment or last-used).
4. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
5. Set Surround level slider to 85.
6. Fully close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recents / force kill).
7. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
8. Verify the 'Environment' sub-setting tab is still selected.
9. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 85.
10. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
11. Set Free level slider to 60.
12. Fully close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe from recents / force kill).
13. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
14. Verify the 'Speech' sub-setting tab is still selected.
15. Verify the Free level slider still shows 60.
generated_testcases.expected: The sub-setting tab selection (Environment → Speech) persists across app kill and relaunch. After reopening the app, the last-selected sub-setting tab is displayed, and its slider value is preserved at the previously set level (Surround=85, Free=60).

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting values persist when switching between Environment and Speech tabs
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Surround level slider to 75.
5. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Free level slider to 40.
7. Tap back to the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
8. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 75 (not reset to default).
9. Tap back to the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
10. Verify the Free level slider still shows 40 (not reset to default).
11. Repeat steps 7-10 three more times to confirm consistent persistence.
generated_testcases.expected: Switching between Environment and Speech sub-setting tabs does NOT reset the other sub-setting's value. Each sub-setting independently retains its last-set slider value (Surround=75, Free=40) regardless of how many times the user switches tabs.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting tab and values persist after navigating to another settings screen and back
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Free level slider to 50.
5. Tap the back arrow to return to Audio Settings screen.
6. Navigate to a different settings screen (e.g., tap 'Equalizer' or 'Voice Alerts').
7. Tap back to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
8. Verify the 'Speech' sub-setting tab is still selected.
9. Verify the Free level slider still shows 50.
10. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
11. Set Surround level slider to 90.
12. Tap back to Audio Settings, then navigate to Device Info screen.
13. Tap back to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
14. Verify the 'Environment' sub-setting tab is still selected.
15. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 90.
generated_testcases.expected: Navigating away from Transparency Mode to other settings screens and back preserves both the selected sub-setting tab and its slider value. The app does not reset to defaults when the user leaves and returns to the Transparency Mode screen.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting tab and values persist after app background/foreground cycle
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Free level slider to 70.
5. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Surround level slider to 30.
7. Press the Home button to background the app (do not kill it).
8. Wait 10 seconds, then reopen the app from the app switcher or launcher.
9. Verify the app returns to the Transparency Mode screen (or navigate: tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode).
10. Verify the 'Environment' sub-setting tab is still selected.
11. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 30.
12. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
13. Verify the Free level slider still shows 70.
generated_testcases.expected: Backgrounding and foregrounding the app preserves both the selected sub-setting tab and all slider values. Environment tab shows Surround=30, Speech tab shows Free=70 after the background/foreground cycle.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting tab and values persist after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Free level slider to 55.
5. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Surround level slider to 80.
7. Disconnect Bluetooth (turn off Bluetooth on phone, or put earbuds in case and close lid).
8. Wait 5 seconds.
9. Reconnect Bluetooth (turn Bluetooth back on, or open case and wait for reconnection).
10. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
11. Verify the 'Environment' sub-setting tab is still selected.
12. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 80.
13. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
14. Verify the Free level slider still shows 55.
generated_testcases.expected: After a Bluetooth disconnect and reconnect cycle, the Transparency Mode sub-setting tab selection and all slider values are preserved. Environment tab shows Surround=80, Speech tab shows Free=55.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting values persist after device power off/on cycle
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Surround level slider to 100.
5. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Free level slider to 25.
7. Place earbuds in the charge case and close the lid (device powers off).
8. Wait 10 seconds.
9. Open the charge case lid (device powers on and reconnects).
10. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
11. Verify the 'Speech' sub-setting tab is still selected (last tab before power off).
12. Verify the Free level slider still shows 25.
13. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
14. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 100.
generated_testcases.expected: After powering the earbuds off (in case) and back on, the Transparency Mode sub-setting tab selection and slider values persist. Environment tab shows Surround=100, Speech tab shows Free=25.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Sub-setting values persist after phone reboot
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Surround level slider to 65.
5. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Free level slider to 45.
7. Reboot the phone.
8. After phone restarts, ensure Bluetooth is enabled.
9. Wait for the earbuds to reconnect automatically (or manually reconnect via Bluetooth settings).
10. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
11. Verify the 'Speech' sub-setting tab is still selected.
12. Verify the Free level slider still shows 45.
13. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
14. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 65.
generated_testcases.expected: After a full phone reboot, the Transparency Mode sub-setting tab selection and slider values are preserved. Environment tab shows Surround=65, Speech tab shows Free=45.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Rapid switching between Environment and Speech does not cause value corruption
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Surround level slider to 95.
5. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Free level slider to 10.
7. Rapidly switch between Environment and Speech tabs 10 times (tap each tab alternately as fast as possible).
8. After the rapid switching, tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
9. Verify the Surround level slider still shows 95.
10. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
11. Verify the Free level slider still shows 10.
generated_testcases.expected: Rapid switching between Environment and Speech sub-setting tabs does not corrupt or reset slider values. Both sub-settings retain their independently set values (Surround=95, Free=10) after rapid tab toggling.

generated_testcases.title: [Free 60/Free 20] Transparency Mode — Device asymmetry: TWS earbuds retain sub-setting values vs. over-ear headset baseline
steps: 1. Connect Poly Voyager Free 60+ (or Free 20) to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
3. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab.
4. Set Surround level slider to 70.
5. Tap the 'Speech' sub-setting tab.
6. Set Free level slider to 35.
7. Fully close the Poly Studio Mobile app (force kill).
8. Reopen Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Free 60+] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
9. Verify the 'Speech' sub-setting tab is selected and Free level = 35.
10. Tap the 'Environment' sub-setting tab and verify Surround level = 70.
11. Disconnect the Free 60/Free 20 and connect a Voyager Surround 80 (over-ear headset).
12. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → tap [Voyager Surround 80] → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
13. Verify that Transparency Mode sub-settings (Environment/Speech) are present and functional on the over-ear device as well.
14. Set Environment Surround level to 50 and Speech Free level to 50 on the Surround 80.
15. Close and reopen the app, then verify values persist on the Surround 80.
generated_testcases.expected: Both TWS earbuds (Free 60/Free 20) and over-ear headsets (Surround 80) support Transparency Mode with Environment/Speech sub-settings. Values persist independently per device after app kill/relaunch. The bug is confirmed on Free 60/Free 20 specifically, but the feature should work consistently across device types.
